However, any chance of turning the tie around quickly vanished as Paris Saint-Germain scored twice in the first half. arts.ttl: Video: Watch Emiliano Martínez’s Major Mistake Lead to Achraf Hakimi Goal as Aston Villa’s Hopes Fade
arts.sum: Aston Villa came into the second leg at Villa Park believing a comeback was possible, especially with their home crowd behind them. But any hopes of turning the tie around were quickly dashed, as Paris Saint-Germain struck early to take a 1-0 lead and push their aggregate advantage to 4-1. Bradley Barcola burst down the […] The post Video: Watch Emiliano Martínez’s Major Mistake Lead to Achraf Hakimi Goal as Aston Villa’s Hopes Fade appeared first on PSG Talk.

Fixtures Aston Villa Vs. Paris Saint-Germain - Tue, Apr 15th 2025, 20:00 Aston Villa supporters celebrated yet another special pre-match show ahead of our UEFA Champions League quarter-final second leg against Paris Saint-Germain. Villa Park came together as one to showcase all things claret and blue on the grandest European stage, a memorable spectacle transforming our matchday in B6 into a proud declaration of identity. ‘This is Villa Park’ is more than a slogan – it’s a salute to our past, a roar from our present and a promise for the future. From the iron gates of the Holte End to the hearts of every fan. History, pride and ambition under the lights! The gates of the Holte End are a sacred symbol of our club’s spirit – where pride, passion and legacy unite. It’s the backdrop for two strong, fierce roaring lions, watchful and eternal, standing guard over our house as we host Europe’s elite club competition from within the heart of English football. This is Villa Park. From founders to fighters, this is who we are – brave and prepared. As the tifo lifted to set the tone on an unforgettable moment in the club’s history, supporters raised their commemorative scarves featuring manager Unai Emery and his Villa squad – creating a unified sea of claret and blue. It all came together with original audio, timed to the tifo reveal, and immersive stadium visuals amplifying the theme ‘The Heart of English Football’ as well as lights, flames and fireworks in a dazzling display. With sound, sight and sentiment woven together, it became a once-in-a-lifetime memory for Villa fans both in the stadium and around the world. At the base of the Holte End, through the roar of the crowd, under the watch of our lions. Founded in courage. Fuelled by pride. This is Villa Park. UTV!

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs PSG viewers spot embarrassing blunder seconds before Champions League clash
arts.sum: Aston Villa lined up against PSG on Tuesday night in what was one of the biggest nights in the club's history - but the occasion was spoiled somewhat by a bizarre gaffe that saw the Europa League anthem played instead of the Champions League song
